title: How do I automatically upload a quote/invoice to Monday.com after I send it from Outlook? Need a bit of a walk through please
excerpt: Hi there, I need a quote/invoice to be automatically uploaded to Monday.com after I send it to the client from outllook?

posts.author: Iamnoaml3vy (John Stevenson)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi there, I need a quote/invoice to be automatically uploaded to Monday.com after I send it to the client from outllook?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Iamnoaml3vy! Would you be happy to elaborate on how you’re currently creating these quotes/invoices? Are they being created through a 3rd party app or platform? This information would help me understand how we can set this up for you!

I did want to mention that we do have our own app available that allows you to create and store the quote/invoice within the item to then send t the specific client?

  • Quotes & Invoices on monday.com

I look forward to hearing from you!
